title: orchis morio var. libani
intro: Orchis morio var. libani, also known as the Cypriot Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Orchis morio var. libani include its potential to treat urinary tract infections and kidney stones, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with fluid retention. Herbal preparations of Orchis morio var. libani include infusions and decoctions made from the roots and flowers of the plant, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
